title: Question about Angel names
wikitext:
[]: Question about Angel names             Quote Post by KIC » Mon May 16, 2005 2:59 pm Okay, I've now watched episode 1-5 and 15-23 (I've got the French DVDs, but can't find volume 2 and 3..) and read the manga up to volume 7, and there's one thing that keeps bugging me: Where are the names of the Angels mentioned? I've only seen them referred to by their numbers. (I also wonder how the F**K an organisation like NERV could have been put up without any sensible person thinking "What a bunch of dangerous sectarian lunatics...")

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Mon May 16, 2005 3:13 pm Adam is mentioned in episode 8. Lilith in episode 24 From Sachiel to Sahaquiel (sp??) in episode 14 From Sachiel to Armisael in episode 23. Tabris is mentioned in Newtype 100% and the manga, volume 8 I believe.

[]: Re: Stupid Eva question             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon May 16, 2005 3:16 pm KIC wrote: (I also wonder how the F**K an organisation like NERV could have been put up without any sensible person thinking "What a bunch of dangerous sectarian lunatics...")

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Mon May 16, 2005 3:20 pm AchtungAffen wrote: Tabris is mentioned in Newtype 100% and the manga, volume 8 I believe.

[]:             Quote Post by KIC » Tue May 17, 2005 2:38 pm AchtungAffen wrote: Adam is mentioned in episode 8. Lilith in episode 24 Tabris is mentioned in Newtype 100% and the manga, volume 8 I believe.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue May 17, 2005 5:43 pm KIC wrote: Hmm...I guess they left some of the names out of the subs...might have to watch it dubbed next time.

[]:             Quote Post by KIC » Thu May 19, 2005 2:43 pm Reichu wrote: KIC wrote: Hmm...I guess they left some of the names out of the subs...might have to watch it dubbed next time.
